instrumentation: Added APP_PERF_LOGS-gated server perf timing with phase markers for create/update/delete/read paths
write_path: Parallelized independent country/city/currency validation lookups in create/update actions
Removed pre-insert duplicate lookup queries and kept unique-index error handling path
Memoized provider photos bucket existence checks per runtime
Batched provider photo inserts into single DB insert per request
read_path: Replaced city-name fanout country filter with direct provider_profiles.country_id filter
Replaced per-document signed URL loop with single createSignedUrls batch call
database: Added pg_trgm search indexes for business_name and provider_slug
Added composite indexes for country/status/featured + created_at filters
Added provider_photos and provider_listing_documents ordering indexes
deeper_optimizations: Added timeout-bounded Google Place resolution for create flow so slow external lookup does not block write path
